pageContext.name: The Amazing Spider-Man #665 (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Amazing Spider-Man #665 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring variant cover art for Marvel's The Amazing Spider-Man #66, here we see Peter Parker effortlessly straddling a bright marquee rebuilding a very well-deserved title. As part of 'The Painted Works of the Marvel Universe' series by renowned artist Paolo Rivera, this print makes a perfect companion to The Amazing Spider-Man #15!  Limited to only 175, don't miss your chance to add this exciting Spider-Man print to your Marvel gallery today!
